name: Animated Flying Sword

traits.name: Immunities
traits.text: Poison, Psychic; Charmed, Deafened, Exhaustion, Frightened, Paralyzed, Petrified, Poisoned

text:
# Animated Flying Sword

*Small Construct, Unaligned*

A blade that fights on without a hand to wield it, darting through the air on invisible currents of magic.

### Actions

**Slash.** Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 6 (1d8 + 2) Slashing damage.
